titleStmt.title: SII 9.425: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 425. (A.R. No. 400 of 1928.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A FIELD NEAR HALE-AGRAHARA AT SANKARANARAYANA, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1324, Vishu, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 12, Ā[divāra]. Śrāvaṇa śu. 12 of Vishu corresponded to A.D. 1401 July 22 Friday (not Sunday), but in Vikrama the tithi did fall on a Sunday = A.D. 1400 August 18. The inscription refers itself to the reign of Harihararāya who was ruling from Dōrasamudra. It records that when Basavaṇṇa-Oḍeya was governing the kingdom from Bārakūru under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Gōpayadaṇṇāyaka-Oḍeya, Mādāḍi-Toḷaha made a grant of a fixed quantity of rice per day for the service of the god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ya saṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakhavarṣa kaliyugada 1324 neya
viṣusaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 12 Ā śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhipati hiṁdurāyasuratrāṇa bhā
ṣegetappuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīrapratāpa harihararāyaru dōrasamudrada
nelebīḍinoḷiddu duṣṭanigrahaṣiṣṭapratipālaneyammāḍi Ēkachatradiṁ sthirarājyaṁge
yyuttaṁviralu pādapadmōpajīvitarappa śrīmanmahāpradhāna gōpeyadaṁṇāya
kaOḍeyara svakāruṇyadiṁ śrīmatu basavaṁṇaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājadhāni
yoḷirddu svadharmadalū rājyappratipālisuttaṁ yirda kāladalu śrīmatu koḍageya
śrīśaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvariṁge mādāḍitoḷaharu māḍida dharmapratiṣThe Ā dēvariṁge
pratidina Udeyakāladalu Amṛtapaḍige Akki hā 1 Akṣaradalu Oṁdu hāne Akki �yo
maryādeyalu prativarṣa 1 kaṁ Akki nāgaṁḍeyalu mū 9 hā 6 Akṣaradalu voṁbhattu
mūḍeyu Āṟu hāne Akki kālakālakke tappade naḍevaṁtāgi toḷaharu taṁma sahō
dara saṁbaṁdhi naḍevā tāu biṭṭa dāyada mūlabāḷu savaḍadahāḷu
ya gade 1 kaṁ bittuva bittu nāgaṁḍeyalu mū 4 Akṣaradalu nālku mūḍe bittu bījada
gadeyanu kāṇike kaḍḍāya Āudū yilla sarvamānyavāgi dharmācaṁdrārkasthāyyāgi naḍadu bahaṁ
tāgi trikaraṇaśuddhavāgi dhārāpūrvakavāgi Eṟedu koṭṭaru śrīśaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvaru Āṟa
tāu savaḍadahāḷige bijayaṁgeydu gaṁgāsnānava māḍidāga śrīpadāṁbujakāṇike
yakṣayake Aḍake yelege kāṭiga 3 pratidina 1 naṁdādīptiya maryyādeyalu naḍava ye(ṁ)ṇnege
kāṭiga 6 Ubhayaṁ kā ga 9 Akṣaradalu kāṭiga Oṁbhattu hoṁnu savaḍada Oḷage beriyaśayakalada haḷiya
ṭi kaḷu teṟuva teṟu ma 4 dina modaloḷage śrīśaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvariṁge Oṁbhattu hoṁnu kāla
kālake naḍadu bahaṁtāgi dharmmācaṁdrārkasthāyyāgi dhāreyaneṟedu koṭaru pūrvadali śaṁkaranā
rāyaṇadēvarige pradōṣa padōṣapūjege naivēdyake pratitiṁgaḷige Akki hāne 4 ratri
pondake brāhmaṇa jana 2 kaṁ bhōjanake Aki hāne 2 Ubhayaṁ Āṟu hāne Akkiya ma
kkiya bāḷinalu
dharmavanu mā
Digital edition of SII 9.425 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
